programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: The Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Join Claudio Fabiano and Adamo De Nigris for the Greatest Show on Earth - as the team analyse and bring you all the latest on the FIFA World Cup 2026 groups.

programme.title: The Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Join Claudio Fabiano and Adamo De Nigris for the Greatest Show on Earth - as the team analyse and bring you all the latest on the FIFA World Cup 2026 groups.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw Bitesize
programme.desc: Join host Adam Liaw and all your favourite chefs, cooks and celebrities for the best bits from The Cook Up kitchen.

programme.title: The Bee Whisperer
programme.desc: Charlie is a pro when it comes to bee removal. But the one technique he can never seem to nail down is the \.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News At Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Newshour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Armed with new information about the elusive stakes in the swamp, the team redoubles their search efforts with thrilling results.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Steve, Drew and Jonquil fight for another shot at being a Jeopardy champion.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell take on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow
programme.desc: The epic action of Edge of Tomorrow unfolds in a near future in which an alien race has hit the Earth in an unrelenting assault, unbeatable by any military unit in the world. Major William Cage is an officer who has never seen a day of combat when he is unceremoniously dropped into what amounts to a suicide mission.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: Cardi's mum shows up in Hawley - she is getting married... again. Meanwhile, Carol gets a nasty shock of her own.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: After being humiliated by some local youths, Ashley decides it's time to up his game - with the help of Jim and Cardi.

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: After gatecrashing Preethi’s – Amrita’s sister – hen night, Abdulla is introduced as Amrita’s new Sikh boyfriend, and Preethi is beyond excited to welcome him into the family; so much so, in fact, that she insists that he attends the wedding. Franck is less than pleased that he isn’t on the list, but he is determined to make an appearance too, in a bid to woo the family. Meanwhile, Kathy is on notice from the coven to do away with her Abdulla problem. She seeks out old friend and yoga-loving Hindu vampire Rishi for assistance. When Abdulla realizes what Franck is planning, he makes a mad dash to the wedding to try and intercept him before it is too late. Little does he know, though, that Shafi has also turned up to sabotage what he thinks are Abdulla’s nuptials at an Indian wedding that lasts long in the memory.

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Abdulla and Amrita escape from the wedding. They tell each other they love each other. Shafi and the coven plan to stop Abdulla from escaping.

programme.title: Dark Side Of The Ring
programme.desc: With her piercing scream, Shannon Spruill becomes a cult star as Daffney in the squared circle, however outside the ring, Daffney fights a much more punishing battle with bipolar disorder and mental illness.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: Te Ao With Moana
programme.desc: A weekly current affairs show that examines New Zealand and international stories through a Maori lens.

programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: Euronews The Ring
programme.desc: Two political representatives from across the EU propose a diversity of opinions and conversations around the most important issues of EU affairs and the wider European political life.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers The Heartbreak Kid with Ben Gannon & Michael Jenkins, Mississippi Masala with Mira Nair & Denzel Washington, plus Dragon and Leolo.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Peter's Friends with Kenneth Branagh & Emma Thompson, Hot Shots! Part Deux, Wild Wheels, and Sofie with Liv Ullmann.

programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Reeling from storm, the remaining participants continue to deal with the consequences of their actions. One survivalist's food supply is threatened, while another reveals a secret that jeopardizes their chances of winning the half-a-million dollar prize.

programme.title: UFOs: Investigating The Unknown
programme.desc: In 2015, Navy pilots report having strange encounters with UFOs that have no wings, no cockpit, no exhaust, but can somehow fly with great agility.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Do citizen sleuths hinder or help in the search for truth?

programme.desc: After raising the 40,000 pound boulder from Lot 8, the team is astonished to find a manmade feature that may be hiding a shaft or tunnel.

programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format. S40 Second Chance.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: An American television quiz show in which three contestants try to win money as they are quizzed on all types of trivia.

programme.desc: The Last Don shows how a decidedly new, more aggressive commitment by law enforcement to \.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Today, many people are afraid of walking into a cursed place or touching a reportedly cursed object. But if curses are real then what brings them into existence? And how are they triggered?

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: JJ and Sugar's joyous celebrations turn into a morbid affair after the gang learns of some sad news.

programme.title: The Nine Lives Of Howard Stern
programme.desc: Howard Stern's transformation from raunchy shock jock to therapy-loving recluse is one of the most incredible tales of reinvention and redemption in media history.

programme.title: The Dangerous Rise Of Andrew Tate
programme.desc: This documentary explores the dangerous rise of Andrew Tate.

programme.title: Land Of The Giants: Titans Of Tech
programme.desc: Google has arguably become the most powerful company the world has ever known. But what does Google know about us, and what is it doing with that information?
